title: Simple Night Vision Goggles
description: Adds Night Vision Goggles! (Perfect for Timeless and Classic Guns)
body:
# Very Simple!
Adds Night Vision Goggles for Curios. Perfect to use with Timeless and Classic Guns
There is a Green and Blue Version


## Recipe
- Iron ingot, Glass Pane, Iron ingot = Green night vision Goggles
- Goggles + blue dye = Blue night vision Goggles

## Dependencies
1.18.2+
Curios!

## Licensing
You are only allowed to use it in your Modpack if you share it through modrinth. I do not allow reupload of my mod!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
